case_title: VICKIE STEELE VS. WYETH LLC et al

docket_entries.description: NOT REPORTED. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-10-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. THE CASE IS COORDINATED WITH REGLAN/METOCLOPRAMIDE CASES, JCCP 4631. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; DEPT. 303.

PRODUCTS LIABILITY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEELE, VICKIE OBO DECEDENT DIANE APPLEGATE AS TO DEFENDANT WYETH LLC JOHN DOE DRUG COMPANY DEFENDANTS (1-500) SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-10-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-08-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-25-2013 COMPLEX LITIGATION ASSIGNMENT REQUESTED BY FILING PARTIES; FEE INCLUDED IN FILING FEE
